embeddings.name: Minimalist
embeddings.text: Fashion style: Minimalist. Clean lines, neutral tones, and understated silhouettes. Focuses on quality over quantity with monochromatic palettes. Colors: white, black, beige, grey, ivory. Fabrics: cotton, linen, silk, cashmere. Mood: calm, sophisticated, modern. Occasions: office, casual, evening. Keywords: minimalism, clean, timeless, neutral.

embeddings.name: Bohemian
embeddings.text: Fashion style: Bohemian. Free-spirited, eclectic aesthetic with flowing fabrics, earthy tones, and artisanal details. Inspired by 1970s counter-culture. Colors: terracotta, burnt orange, mustard, forest green, cream. Fabrics: chiffon, suede, crochet, denim, lace. Mood: free-spirited, artistic, relaxed. Occasions: festival, casual, beach, travel. Keywords: boho, ethnic, flowy, vintage, earthy.

embeddings.name: Streetwear
embeddings.text: Fashion style: Streetwear. Urban-inspired fashion blending sportswear, hip-hop culture, and skate aesthetics. Oversized fits, graphic prints, and bold logos. Colors: black, white, neon yellow, red, camo green. Fabrics: fleece, nylon, jersey, denim, mesh. Mood: bold, edgy, youthful, rebellious. Occasions: casual, sport, urban. Keywords: urban, hype, oversized, graphic, sneakers.

embeddings.name: Haute Couture
embeddings.text: Fashion style: Haute Couture. Highest form of fashion craftsmanship. Hand-sewn garments with extraordinary detail, luxury fabrics, and bespoke tailoring. Colors: champagne, ivory, midnight blue, deep red, gold. Fabrics: silk organza, duchesse satin, tulle, brocade, velvet. Mood: luxurious, dramatic, artistic, powerful. Occasions: gala, red carpet, wedding, formal. Keywords: luxury, couture, handcrafted, bespoke, elegant.

embeddings.name: Y2K Revival
embeddings.text: Fashion style: Y2K Revival. Early 2000s nostalgia reimagined — low-rise jeans, butterfly clips, metallic fabrics, and playful cyber-inspired silhouettes. Colors: hot pink, baby blue, silver, lavender, lime green. Fabrics: vinyl, mesh, velour, metallic lycra. Mood: playful, nostalgic, futuristic, fun. Occasions: party, casual, festival. Keywords: Y2K, 2000s, retro-futurism, pop, metallic.

embeddings.name: Dark Academia
embeddings.text: Fashion style: Dark Academia. Moody, intellectual aesthetic inspired by classic literature and elite universities. Layered tweed, plaid, and rich dark tones. Colors: burgundy, dark brown, forest green, navy, cream. Fabrics: tweed, wool, corduroy, velvet, leather. Mood: mysterious, intellectual, nostalgic, gothic. Occasions: casual, academic, autumn outings. Keywords: academia, gothic, literary, layered, vintage.

embeddings.name: Quiet Luxury
embeddings.text: Fashion trend (2024-2025): Quiet Luxury. Understated wealth signaling through impeccable craftsmanship and logoless designs. Muted palettes with premium materials. Key pieces: cashmere turtleneck, tailored trousers, leather loafers, structured bag. Mood: refined, understated, affluent. Keywords: stealth wealth, old money, logoless, timeless.

embeddings.name: Dopamine Dressing
embeddings.text: Fashion trend (2024): Dopamine Dressing. Vibrant, mood-boosting fashion with maximalist color combinations. Wearing joy as self-expression. Key pieces: color-block dress, neon separates, bold print co-ords, bright accessories. Mood: joyful, energetic, optimistic. Keywords: colorful, maximalist, bold, expressive, joyful.

embeddings.name: Gorpcore
embeddings.text: Fashion trend (2024-2025): Gorpcore. Outdoor technical wear adapted for everyday style. Hiking boots, fleece vests, and technical outerwear merged with fashion sensibility. Key pieces: trail runners, fleece jacket, cargo pants, puffer vest, technical backpack. Mood: adventurous, functional, rugged. Keywords: outdoors, technical, utilitarian, hiking, functional fashion.

embeddings.name: Sheer Elegance
embeddings.text: Fashion trend (2025): Sheer Elegance. Translucent and semi-sheer fabrics used as statement pieces — layered or standalone, both modest and daring. Key pieces: sheer blouse, organza skirt, mesh overlay dress, transparent trench. Mood: romantic, daring, feminine, ethereal. Keywords: sheer, transparent, layering, romantic, SS2025.

embeddings.name: Draped Silhouette
embeddings.text: Design element: Draped Silhouette. Fabric artfully folded and draped around the body, creating fluid, goddess-like forms. Inspired by Grecian sculpture. Techniques: cowl draping, bias cut, asymmetric hem. Fabrics: silk, jersey, chiffon, crepe. Keywords: drape, fluid, grecian, romantic, goddess.

embeddings.name: Puff Sleeve
embeddings.text: Design element: Puff Sleeve. Voluminous sleeves gathered at the shoulder, cuff, or both. Adds drama and femininity to any silhouette. Techniques: gathering, smocking, elastic casing. Fabrics: cotton poplin, organza, velvet, linen. Keywords: romantic, dramatic, vintage, feminine, volume.

embeddings.name: Asymmetric Hem
embeddings.text: Design element: Asymmetric Hem. Uneven hem that creates visual interest and movement. Ranges from subtle diagonal cuts to dramatic high-low silhouettes. Techniques: diagonal cut, high-low hem, handkerchief hem. Fabrics: chiffon, silk, jersey, satin. Keywords: asymmetric, modern, dynamic, editorial, movement.

embeddings.name: Office / Business Casual
embeddings.text: Occasion: Office / Business Casual. Professional yet approachable dressing for modern workplaces. Polished but not overly formal. Key pieces: blazer, trousers, midi skirt, button-down shirt, loafers. Tip: Invest in a well-tailored blazer — it elevates any outfit instantly.. Keywords: work, professional, business, polished.

embeddings.name: Beach / Resort
embeddings.text: Occasion: Beach / Resort. Effortless vacation dressing — breezy, vibrant, and sun-ready. Cover-ups, sarongs, and statement swimwear. Key pieces: kaftan, linen co-ord, straw hat, slide sandals, one-piece swimsuit. Tip: A printed kaftan over a swimsuit is the ultimate resort-to-lunch transition.. Keywords: beach, resort, vacation, summer, relaxed.
